name: sandblast-backend
description: Sandblast backend with private Marion Layers 6-8 conversational continuity and intent depth isolation

scripts.verify: npm run lint:syntax && npm run test:nyx-ecosystem && npm run test:nyx-content && npm run test:marion-layering && npm run verify:nyx-voice && npm run verify:sandblast-tv
scripts.dev: node --check index.js && npm run lint:sandblast-tv && node index.js
scripts.lint:sandblast-tv: node --check SandblastTV/index.js && node --check SandblastTV/routes.js && node --check SandblastTV/manifestStore.js && node --check SandblastTV/schedulerService.js && node --check SandblastTV/mediaValidator.js && node --check SandblastTV/widgetBridge.js
scripts.verify:sandblast-tv: npm run lint:sandblast-tv && npm run test:sandblast-tv
scripts.verify:nyx-voice: node --check Routes/tts.js && node --check Routes/ttsProvidersResemble.js && node --check Routes/voiceRoute.js && node --check Routes/nyxVoiceMount.js && node --check utils/chatEngine.js && node --check utils/stateSpine.js && node --check public/nyx_state_controller.js && npm run test:nyx-voice && npm run test:nyx-route-mount && npm run test:nyx-widget && npm run test:nyx-widget-playback
